_comment: Source of truth for hal0 runner images. `owned` images build from a Dockerfile in THIS repo (build.context/dockerfile). `referenced` images build in their own upstream repo (build.source_repo @ build.ref) and are only pinned here — this repo does NOT vendor their source (decision 2026-07-19: reference, don't absorb). scripts/emit-manifest.sh resolves each image's published ghcr digest and PRs it into Hal0ai/hal0 manifest.json under the matching manifest_key. rocmfpx/vulkanfpx use a separate app-side pin (DEFAULT_ROCMFPX_IMAGE, schema.py) rather than manifest.json.toolbox_images.

cpu.notes: llama.cpp CPU/Vulkan fallback. Self-contained (clones llama.cpp in builder).

flm.notes: FastFlowLM v0.9.44 on AMD XDNA2 NPU. FLM_REF build-arg controls upstream tag.

kokoro.notes: Kokoro-82M TTS (CPU ONNX). Dockerfile RECONSTRUCTED from image history 2026-07-19; rebuild-VERIFIED same day (built clean + container serves, /health 200 model_loaded=true, 54 voices, default af_bella).

moonshine.notes: Moonshine STT (CPU/Vulkan). Dockerfile RECONSTRUCTED from ghcr config blob 2026-07-19; rebuild-VERIFIED same day (built clean + container serves, /health 200 model_loaded=true, model_id moonshine-small_streaming-en).

qwen3tts.notes: Qwen3-TTS multilingual GPU TTS (ROCm). Migrated as-is from app repo packaging/toolbox.

comfyui.notes: NEW hal0-owned ComfyUI (gfx1151 ROCm). Replaces third-party docker.io/kyuz0/amd-strix-halo-comfyui. Single ROCm image — no vulkan variant (see comfyui/README.md). All build inputs pinned 2026-07-19: fedora base by digest, torch triple by dated nightly (cp313 @ 20260501), ComfyUI + 3 nodes by commit SHA. SMOKE-TESTED on gfx1151 (143): builds, ROCm torch sees Radeon 8060S, ComfyUI 0.28.0 serves /system_stats. Remaining before publish: push :latest + digest-pin in app manifest.

vulkan.notes: llama.cpp Vulkan backend (default Strix Halo iGPU). Built + published by amd-strix-halo-toolboxes' own CI (.github/workflows/build_and_publish.yml). NOT vendored here — pin only.

rocm.notes: llama.cpp ROCm backend, multi-arch gfx1030..gfx1151. Built by amd-strix-halo-toolboxes CI. NOT vendored here.

rocmfpx.notes: FPX llama.cpp fork (the primary LLM runner on the boxes). Owned GH fork Hal0ai/Hal0_ROCmFPX; tag c077206 = commit c0772068. NOT vendored — pinned via app-side DEFAULT_ROCMFPX_IMAGE, not manifest.json. Builder base comes from amd-strix-halo-toolboxes.

rocmfpx-hy3.notes: Hy3 variant of the FPX runner: adds IFP2 (ggml type107) + minicpm5 + the hy_v3 NextN/MTP patch so Hy3-Chadrock-FPX-IFP2-MTP loads. Built 2026-07-14 on CT105; was local-only until pushed to ghcr 2026-07-19. Both floating tag :ifp2-hyv3-mtp and digest-named :ifp2-hyv3-d7e1f26 share manifest sha256:dbb443fc… (config/image id 57aaafb773b1). Builder toolchain localhost/hal0-rocmfpx-builder:7.2.4 (may or may not be pushed). Referenced, digest-pinned; app follow-up: repin [profile.hy3-fpx] from :ifp2-hyv3-mtp to the digest. hy3 slot enabled=false (91GB weights can't co-reside with agent slot on 128GB).
